hook: You’re tired of having to perform happiness all the time.
slide2: I hate when people say 'it’ll be okay' like it’s some magic fix. What if it’s not?
slide3: My chest feels heavy today. Not sadness, just… this quiet ache that won’t go away.
slide4: Why do I always compare my behind-the-scenes to everyone’s highlight reel?
closer: What’s one thing you’ve been too afraid to admit out loud?
caption:
Sometimes the only thing missing is permission to not be okay. What’s one emotion you’ve been pretending doesn’t exist? 💀

#GenZFeels #NotOkayIsOkay #BehindTheGlow #IndianMood #RealTalk
